Definition: The set of modalities for the images in the dataset, i.e., the type(s) of device, process or method that originally acquired or produced the data.
Usage note: The controlled vocabulary is defined by the subclasses of the range 'eucaim:ImagingModality' (eucaim:IMG1000009). This metadata field can be populated based on DICOM tag Modality (0008,0060) after mapping.

Definition: The number of imaging sessions according to this described protocol in the dataset.
Free-text description of the imaging session protocol.
The ScanProtocol objects that describe the scans that make up the imaging session.

Usage note: The controlled vocabulary is defined by the subclasses of the range 'eucaim:Manufacturer'' (eucaim:IMG1000010). DICOM tag Manufacturer (0008,0070) contains values in free text which have to be mapped first.

Definition: Period of time in which the imaging sessions were created.
A description of the method(s) used to de-identify the imaging data.
The position of the patient relative to the imaging equipment space. See DICOM tag (0018, 5100) Patient Position.
Usage note: Vocabulary to be determined; for example https://dicom.nema.org/medical/dicom/current/output/chtml/part03/sect_C.7.3.html#sect_C.7.3.1.1.2

Definition: The original purpose for which the imaging session took place.
Usage note: Vocabulary to be determined; for example: diagnostic, repeat/follow-up/monitoring, radiotherapy planning, intra-interventional, etc..
